name: Duoc Nguyen
tagline: Pi-shaped engineer: Backend/AI tooling × AI agents/MCP × Product iteration
bio: I'm Duoc — an Engineering Manager at FireGroup and a builder at heart.
Over 13 years I've shipped production systems in Go and TypeScript, from real-time backends to developer tooling.
My open source work sits at the intersection of AI and developer experience: MCP connectors, Claude Code plugins, and agent communication primitives.
Outside of work I run aiocean.io — a personal AI-powered productivity suite — and write about software craft and product thinking at 12bit.vn and onepercent.plus.
I co-organized the Vue.js Vietnam community back in 2016 and still care about building a strong local tech scene.
I believe the best tools are invisible, the best systems are boring, and the best code is the code you don't have to write.

projects.title: claude-plugins
projects.description: Claude Code plugins for AI-assisted dev
